subject: [PATCH] mm/memcontrol: remove unused for_each_mem_cgroup macro and cleanup

reviews.author: Shakeel Butt
reviews.summary: Acknowledged the cleanup effort, provided an Acked-by tag.
reviews.raw_body:
On Wed, Jun 24, 2026 at 11:36:59AM -0700, Joshua Hahn wrote:
> Commit 7e1c0d6f58207 ("memcg: switch lruvec stats to rstat") removed the
> last caller of for_each_mem_cgroup back in 2021, and there have not been
> any new callers since. Remove the macro.
> 
> A comment in mem_cgroup_css_online has also been out of date since 2021,
> when 2bfd36374edd9 ("mm: vmscan: consolidate shrinker_maps handling
> code") open-coded the for_each_mem_cgroup iterator. Update the comment.
> 
> Finally, 99430ab8b804c ("mm: introduce BPF kfuncs to access memcg
> statistics and events") added a second declaration for memcg_events to
> include/linux/memcontrol.h, duplicating the one in mm/memcontrol-v1.h.
> Let's clean that up too.
> 
> No functional changes intended.
> 
> Signed-off-by: Joshua Hahn <joshua.hahnjy@gmail.com>

Thanks for the cleanup.

Acked-by: Shakeel Butt <shakeel.butt@linux.dev>

reviews.author: SeongJae Park
reviews.summary: Approved the patch, provided a Reviewed-by tag.
reviews.raw_body:
On Wed, 24 Jun 2026 11:36:59 -0700 Joshua Hahn <joshua.hahnjy@gmail.com> wrote:

> Commit 7e1c0d6f58207 ("memcg: switch lruvec stats to rstat") removed the
> last caller of for_each_mem_cgroup back in 2021, and there have not been
> any new callers since. Remove the macro.
> 
> A comment in mem_cgroup_css_online has also been out of date since 2021,
> when 2bfd36374edd9 ("mm: vmscan: consolidate shrinker_maps handling
> code") open-coded the for_each_mem_cgroup iterator. Update the comment.
> 
> Finally, 99430ab8b804c ("mm: introduce BPF kfuncs to access memcg
> statistics and events") added a second declaration for memcg_events to
> include/linux/memcontrol.h, duplicating the one in mm/memcontrol-v1.h.
> Let's clean that up too.
> 
> No functional changes intended.

Nice cleanup, thank you!

> 
> Signed-off-by: Joshua Hahn <joshua.hahnjy@gmail.com>

Reviewed-by: SeongJae Park <sj@kernel.org>


Thanks,
SJ

[...]

2026-06-24.patch_summary: This patch removes the unused for_each_mem_cgroup macro and cleans up related code in mm/memcontrol.c and memcontrol-v1.h. The macro was removed by a previous commit, but its declaration remained in the header file. Additionally, an outdated comment is updated to reflect the current implementation.

reviews.author: Johannes Weiner
reviews.summary: Provided an Acked-by tag, indicating approval of the patch.
reviews.raw_body:
